Sprocket Shaft Bearing Retainer - Standard Threads - Big Twin
Easy solution to the problem of oil seeping around the motor sprocket shaft

Include kit for stripped timing plug holes
Lower Pushrod Tube Kit - Quick Install - Twin Cam
This kit is a must when installing adjustable pushrods in a Twin Cam motor
Includes four short lower tubes and clips, which allow easy access to the adjuster nut and lock nut
Requires the use of OEM inner tubes, springs, spring cups, washers and O-rings.
Pushrod Kit - Lower Covers - Evolution Big Twin '84-'99
These kits contain exact OEM duplicate parts for proper fitment
Upper cover kit contains chrome clips, chrome cups, springs, rubber seals and steel washers for four pushrod tubes
Lower cover kit contains four chrome tubes, steel washers and O-rings
Inner cover kit contains four aluminum inner covers
Pushrod Kit - Inner Covers - Big Twin '79-'84
These kits contain exact OEM duplicate parts for proper fitment
Upper cover kit contains chrome clips, chrome cups, springs, rubber seals and steel washers for four pushrod tubes
Lower cover kit contains four chrome tubes, steel washers and O-rings
Inner cover kit contains four aluminum inner covers
Gas Valve Fitting Kit - Big Twin
Chrome-plated valve fitting kit is designed to use flexible hoses
Inner Primary Mounting Kit 36-54 Big Twin
Attach OE style 3-hole inner primary covers to specific models
Front Belt Drive Pulley Nut - 7/8-14 Thread - Big Twin
Chrome front pulley nut for open primary belt drive applications
Pushrod Cover Conversion and Adapter Kit - Chrome -XL
Adapts your '91-'03 Sportster lifter base to use early style removable pushrod covers
Complete kit includes four adapter rings, four inner tubes, four bottom tubes, four clips, four spring covers, four springs, four spring washers and all seals

Head Bolt Kit - OEM Style/Hex - Chrome - '57-'72 Sportster
Hardened to OEM specifications to prevent stretching
All bolt threads are rolled for superior strength and fit
Complete sets stock-style replacement rocker shaft end plugs, nuts, and washers
